label: fabricated
reason: This document purports to authorize explicit age-based screening of job applicants, which fundamentally contradicts the ADEA's core protections, and no such EEOC Technical Guidance 2025-03 or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document purports to create an EEOC "safe harbor" for age-based screening of job applicants, which directly contradicts the ADEA's core prohibition on age discrimination; the EEOC has no authority to issue guidance permitting age-cohort filtering, and no such Technical Guidance 2025-03 or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists.
